name: Phil Hartman
blurb: The 'Glue' of SNL, a versatile impressionist and character man.
bio: Phil Hartman (1948-1998) was a Canadian-American comedian and actor whose eight seasons on Saturday Night Live earned him the nickname 'the Glue' for holding sketches together, with signature bits like Unfrozen Caveman Lawyer and a definitive Bill Clinton. He was also a beloved voice on The Simpsons and a star of NewsRadio.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
